S.FORM: = Bounnhang Vorachith = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 8 jiyax 15 ka Bounnhang Vorachith ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Laos ta sayang o kiya ka Bounnhang Vorachith, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan laos ta sajaŋ o kija ka bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Bounnhang Vorachith = Mntucing hngkawas 1938 idas 8 jiyax 15 ka Bounnhang Vorachith ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Laos ta sayang o kiya ka Bounnhang Vorachith, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan laos ta sajaŋ o kija ka bounnħaŋ *oɾaʦħitħ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
